description_long: This is a large, rectangular box trailer with a metallic silver exterior, commonly used for transporting goods in urban environments. The trailer features a smooth, slightly weathered metal surface with visible rivets and seams along its length. It is supported by two axles with four wheels located towards the rear, and has a set of double swing doors at the back for loading and unloading cargo. Reflective red and yellow safety markers are visible along the lower edge and rear, enhancing visibility in traffic. The front of the trailer is flat and unadorned, with a hitch mechanism for attachment to a towing vehicle. There are no windows or visible branding on the exterior, giving it a utilitarian appearance.
description: A large, metallic silver box trailer with double rear doors, four wheels, and reflective safety markers, designed for cargo transport. The exterior is smooth and unbranded, with no windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long, metallic body, four wheels, and reflective markers along the lower edge.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the flat, featureless front panel and the hitch area at the bottom.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the same wheel and marker configuration visible.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the double swing doors, rear safety reflectors, and absence of windows or branding.
